title: Create Brass Cursors
description: New stylish cursors for your Create modpack! Requires Cursors Extended.
body:
Are you tired of the default cursor and want something new? You have a Create modpack? Do you REALLY like Create's BRASS?

Well, these cursors are for you!

Don't forget to install [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor)!

Now it works! (believe me)
